page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

BMGT848 Special Topics in Finance (1-9 Credits) Special topics specific to the Finance doctoral field of study. Repeatable to: 18 credits if content differs.

BMGT858 Special Topics in Marketing (1-9 Credits) Special topics specific to the Marketing doctoral field of study. Repeatable to: 18 credits if content differs.
